questions.question: Explain the difference between write-invalidate and write-update cache coherence protocols.
expectedPoints: Write-invalidate invalidates other copies on write
Write-update has lower read latency after writes

questions.question: Describe the MESI protocol with examples of state transitions for read and write operations.
expectedPoints: Explain all four states: Modified, Exclusive, Shared, Invalid
Describe transitions for local read operations
Describe transitions for local write operations
Describe transitions for remote access operations
Provide example scenarios with multiple processors
